<?php /** * sect113r2 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect113r2 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(113, 9, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '00689918DBEC7E5A0DD6DFC0AA55C7', '0095E9A9EC9B297BD4BF36E059184F' ); $this->setBasePoint( '01A57A6A7B26CA5EF52FCDB8164797', '00B3ADC94ED1FE674C06E695BABA1D' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('010000000000000108789B2496AF93', 16)); } }
